assertions.title: File creation preserves multipart upload semantics
observations: Test create_preserves_multipart_semantics passed.
Mock capture verified POST /v1/files uses multipart/form-data with purpose, expires_after fields, and original file bytes/content-type.
Response parsed into typed file object with id file-created.

assertions.title: File listing preserves cursor pagination and filters
observations: Test list_preserves_cursor_pagination_and_filters passed.
Mock capture verified /v1/files query strings preserve after, limit, order, and purpose across pages.
Cursor helper next_after advanced from file-2 and stopped when has_more=false.

assertions.title: File content and file-processing helpers preserve retrieval behavior
observations: Tests content_and_wait_for_processing and wait_for_processing_times_out_with_clear_error passed.
Mock capture verified file content uses /v1/files/file-pending/content and returns raw bytes without JSON coercion.
wait_for_processing polled /v1/files/file-pending until processed and surfaced a timeout-specific error with clear message when max_wait elapsed.

assertions.title: Upload lifecycle preserves create-part-complete-cancel semantics
observations: Test lifecycle_and_chunking passed.
Mock capture verified POST /v1/uploads create payload, multipart add_part upload, POST /v1/uploads/upload-123/complete with ordered part_ids and md5, and POST /v1/uploads/upload-cancel/cancel.
Responses parsed into typed upload/file objects and empty upload id validation returned ErrorKind::Validation.

assertions.title: Chunked upload helper splits inputs predictably and completes in part order
observations: Test chunked_helper_preserves_path_and_in_memory_semantics passed.
Helper split path input into abc/def for part_size=3 and in-memory input into ghij/kl for part_size=4, then completed uploads with returned part_ids in order.
Path uploads inferred filename and bytes; in-memory uploads required filename and byte_length, with missing values rejected as ErrorKind::Validation.

assertions.title: File Retrieve and Delete Preserve Metadata and Deletion Semantics
observations: Test retrieve_and_delete passed.
Mock capture verified GET /v1/files/file-123 and delete on the same route, stable typed file metadata including processed status and filename, and typed deletion object parsing.
Blank file id retrieval was rejected locally with ErrorKind::Validation.

5 tests passed: create_preserves_multipart_semantics, retrieve_and_delete, list_preserves_cursor_pagination_and_filters, content_and_wait_for_processing, wait_for_processing_times_out_with_clear_error
1 test passed: lifecycle_and_chunking
1 test passed: chunked_helper_preserves_path_and_in_memory_semantics

summary: Validated 6 assigned files/uploads retrieval assertions through the mocked cargo surface. All three required cargo test commands exited 0, and all assigned assertions (VAL-FILES-001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 020) were directly proven by passing test output plus inspected test sources; none were blocked.
